scripts.build: npm run build -w @dominion/shared && npm run build -w @dominion/engine && npm run build -w @splendor/engine && npm run build -w @dominion/site && npm run build -w @dominion/client && npm run build -w @splendor/client && npm run build -w @dominion/server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @dominion/server" "npm run dev -w @dominion/client" "npm run dev -w @dominion/site" "npm run dev -w @splendor/client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dominion/engine && npm run test -w @splendor/engine
